task: Show daily weather for New York City.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to AccuWeather, searched for and selected 'New York City, NY', and reached the forecast page for New York City. The page snapshot clearly showed the '10-Day Weather Forecast' section with daily entries (dates, highs/lows, conditions, and precipitation chances). The final response accurately summarized those visible daily forecast details. This satisfies 'Show daily weather for New York City.'
final_result_response:
I opened AccuWeather for New York City, NY. Daily forecast shown:

| Day | High / Low | Forecast | Rain |
|---|---:|---|---:|
| Today 5/13 | 72° / 55° | Clouds and sun, rain tonight | 49% |
| Thu 5/14 | 66° / 51° | Morning rain, then partly cloudy with a shower | 96% |
| Fri 5/15 | 67° / 55° | Variable clouds with a shower | 60% |
| Sat 5/16 | 78° / 63° | Mostly sunny and pleasant | 3% |
| Sun 5/17 | 84° / 63° | Very warm with some sun | 25% |
| Mon 5/18 | 78° / 57° | Pleasant with clouds and sun | 22% |
| Tue 5/19 | 89° / 67° | Mostly sunny and warmer | 25% |
| Wed 5/20 | 81° / 61° | Possible afternoon thunderstorm | 30% |
| Thu 5/21 | 67° / 55° | Cooler, cloudy with showers | 70% |
| Fri 5/22 | 69° / 58° | Some brightening | 2% |
action_history: Opening AccuWeather: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.accuweather.com/');
Searching New York City weather: await page.locator('e10').fill('New York City');
Selecting New York City result: await page.locator('e10').press('Enter');
Opening New York City forecast: await page.locator('e14').click();
